author: The Architect
description: Rules for what Prover WILL GENERATE once complete - NOT for building Prover
note: While building Prover, use the temporary testing rules in /rules/index.json

futureProverGeneration.description: What Prover will automatically generate once operational
futureProverGeneration.scope: 100% test coverage for ALL code: libraries, infrastructure, scripts, applications, etc.
futureProverGeneration.timeline: These rules activate when Prover successfully provides 100% coverage
futureProverGeneration.transition: Once Prover is operational, remove temporary testing rules from /rules/index.json

coverage.rationale: Less than 100%? You have untested code that WILL break.
coverage.escape: Can't test it? Add deno-coverage-ignore with a REASON. Must get approval from The Architect.

hierarchy: Unit - Last resort for the desperate
whatNotToTest: Lines we've explicitly ignored (with documented reasons)
whatProverWillGenerate.location: Same folder as function using index.test.ts
